debug_info.goal:
f : ℝ → ℂ
hf : IsUnifAlmostPeriodic f
⊢ UniformContinuous f

failed_attempts:
by
  intro ε εpos
  obtain ⟨l, hl⟩ := hf (ε / 2) (half_pos εpos)
  have lpos : 0 < l := IsRelDenseWith.pos hl
  use l
  intro x y hxy
  have := hl x
  obtain ⟨t, ht₀, htl, hft⟩ := this
  have := hl y
  obtain ⟨t', ht'₀, ht'l, hft'⟩ := this
  calc
    ‖f x - f y‖
      = ‖f (x + t - t) - f (y + t' - t')‖ := by simp
    _ ≤ ‖f (x + t) - f (x + t - t)‖ + ‖f (y + t') - f (y + t' - t')‖ := by
        simpa [sub_eq_add_neg] using
          norm_sub_le_norm_sub_norm_sub (f (x + t)) (f y) (f (y + t'))
    _ ≤ ε / 2 + ε / 2 := by
        gcongr
        all_goals
          apply hft
          all_goals linarith
    _ = ε := by ring

  intro ε εpos
  obtain ⟨l, hl⟩ := hf εpos
  have lpos := IsRelDenseWith.pos hl
  use l
  intro x y hxy
  have := hl x
  obtain ⟨t, ht₀, htl, hft⟩ := this
  calc
    ‖f y - f x‖
      = ‖f (x + t + (y - x - t)) - f (x + t - t)‖ := by congr 1; ring
    _ ≤ ‖f (x + t + (y - x - t)) - f (x + t)‖ + ‖f (x + t) - f (x + t - t)‖ := by
        simpa [sub_eq_add_neg] using norm_sub_le _ _
    _ ≤ ε + ε := by
        gcongr
        · exact hft (x + t + (y - x - t) - (x + t))
        · exact hft (x + t - t)
    _ = 2 * ε := by ring
  -- Adjust for the actual ε by using ε/2 initially
  have := hf (ε / 2) (half_pos εpos)
  obtain ⟨l, hl⟩ := this
  have lpos := IsRelDenseWith.pos hl
  use l
  intro x y hxy
  have := hl x
  obtain ⟨t, ht₀, htl, hft⟩ := this
  calc
    ‖f y - f x‖
      ≤ ‖f y - f (x + t)‖ + ‖f (x + t) - f x‖ := norm_sub_le _ _
    _ ≤ ε / 2 + ε / 2 := by

          exact hft (y - x - t)
        · exact hft (-t)
    _ = ε := by ring

        by simpa using norm_sub_le_triple _ _ _

        all_goals
          apply hft

        apply hft

by
  rw [Metric.uniformContinuous_iff]
  intro ε εpos
  obtain ⟨l, hl⟩ := hf εpos
  have lpos := IsRelDenseWith.pos hl
  use l
  intro x y hxy
  have := hl x
  obtain ⟨t, ht₀, htx⟩ := this
  have := hl y
  obtain ⟨t', ht'₀, hty⟩ := this
  calc
    ‖f x - f y‖
      = ‖f (x + t - t) - f (y + t' - t')‖ := by simp
    _ ≤ ‖f (x + t - t) - f (x + t - t')‖ + ‖f (x + t - t') - f (y + t' - t')‖ := by
        simpa using norm_sub_le _ _
    _ ≤ ε + ε := by
        gcongr
        <;> try
          { linarith [ht₀, ht'₀, hxy] }
    _ = 2 * ε := by ring
  -- Adjust the epsilon to account for the factor of 2
  -- We redo the argument with ε/2 instead
  have ε2pos : 0 < ε / 2 := half_pos εpos
  obtain ⟨l, hl⟩ := hf ε2pos
  have lpos := IsRelDenseWith.pos hl
  use l
  intro x y hxy
  have := hl x
  obtain ⟨t, ht₀, htx⟩ := this
  calc
    ‖f x - f y‖
      = ‖f (x + t - t) - f (y + t - t)‖ := by simp
    _ ≤ ‖f (x + t) - f (y + t)‖ + ‖f (x + t) - f x‖ + ‖f (y + t) - f y‖ := by
        simpa using norm_sub_le _ _ |>.trans (norm_add_le _ _)
    _ ≤ ε / 2 + ε / 2 := by
        gcongr
        <;> try
          { linarith [ht₀, hxy] }
    _ = ε := by ring

by
  refine' Metric.uniformContinuous_iff.mpr fun ε εpos ↦ _
  obtain ⟨l, hl⟩ := hf εpos
  have lpos : 0 < l := IsRelDenseWith.pos hl
  use l
  intro x y hxy
  have : |x - y| < l := by simpa [abs_sub_lt_iff] using hxy
  obtain ⟨t, ht, hft⟩ := hl x
  have h1 : ‖f (x + t) - f x‖ ≤ ε := hft
  have h2 : ‖f (y + t) - f y‖ ≤ ε := (IsRelDenseWith.mp hl y).imp_right (by aesop)
  calc
    ‖f x - f y‖
      = ‖f x - f (x + t) + (f (y + t) - f y) + (f (x + t) - f (y + t))‖ := by ring_nf
    _ ≤ ‖f x - f (x + t)‖ + ‖f (y + t) - f y‖ + ‖f (x + t) - f (y + t)‖ := by
        simpa using norm_add_le _ _
    _ ≤ ε + ε + 0 := by
        gcongr
        · exact h1
        · exact h2
        · have : x + t = y + t := by linarith
          simp_all
    _ = 2 * ε := by ring
  -- But we need to get within ε, not 2ε. So adjust the initial ε.
  -- Instead, restart with ε/2.

by
  refine' Metric.uniformContinuous_iff.mpr fun ε εpos ↦ _
  obtain ⟨l, hl⟩ := hf εpos
  have lpos : 0 < l := IsRelDenseWith.pos hl
  use l
  intro x y hxy
  have : |x - y| < l := by
    rw [abs_sub_lt_iff] at hxy
    exact lt_of_le_of_lt (le_of_lt hxy.1) (lt_of_le_of_lt (le_abs_self _) hxy.2)
  obtain ⟨t, ht₀, ht₁⟩ := hl x
  have ht₂ : x + t ∈ Set.Ico x (x + l) := by
    rw [Set.mem_Ico]
    constructor
    · linarith
    · linarith
  have htx : |(x + t) - x| = t := by simp
  have hty : |(y + t) - y| = t := by simp
  calc
    ‖f x - f y‖
      = ‖f (x + t - t) - f (y + t - t)‖ := by simp
    _ ≤ ‖f (x + t - t) - f (x + t)‖ + ‖f (x + t) - f (y + t)‖ + ‖f (y + t) - f (y + t - t)‖ := by
        simpa using norm_sub_le_triple _ _ _
    _ ≤ ε + ‖f (x + t) - f (y + t)‖ + ε := by
        gcongr
        · exact (hl _).imp fun t' ht' ↦ IsLinftyAP ε t' f ht'
        · exact (hl _).imp fun t' ht' ↦ IsLinftyAP ε t' f ht'
    _ ≤ ε + ε + ε := by
        gcongr
        exact le_of_lt (by linarith)
    _ = 3 * ε := by ring

by
  rw [Metric.uniformContinuous_iff]
  intro ε εpos
  obtain ⟨l, hl⟩ := hf εpos
  have lpos : 0 < l := IsRelDenseWith.pos hl
  use l
  intro x y hxy
  have : ∃ t ∈ Set.Ico 0 l, x + t ∈ {t | IsLinftyAP ε t f} := hl x
  obtain ⟨t, ⟨ht0, htl⟩, ht⟩ := this
  have : ‖f (x + t) - f x‖ ≤ ε := ht x
  have : ‖f (y + t) - f y‖ ≤ ε := ht y
  calc
    ‖f x - f y‖
      = ‖f (x + t - t) - f (y + t - t)‖ := by congr 1; ring
    _ ≤ ‖f (x + t) - f (y + t)‖ + ‖f (x + t) - f x‖ + ‖f (y + t) - f y‖ := by
        simpa [sub_eq_add_neg] using
          norm_sub_le_of_sub_sub_le (f (x + t)) (f (y + t)) (f x) (f y)
    _ ≤ 0 + ε + ε := by
        gcongr
        · exact sub_eq_zero_of_eq (by linarith [ht0, htl, hxy])
        · exact ht x
        · exact ht y
    _ = 2 * ε := by ring
  -- But we need to get within ε, so adjust the argument with ε/2
  -- Actually, better approach: use ε/2 from the start
  have := hf (ε / 2) (half_pos εpos)
  obtain ⟨l, hl⟩ := this
  have lpos : 0 < l := IsRelDenseWith.pos hl
  use l
  intro x y hxy
  have : ∃ t ∈ Set.Ico 0 l, x + t ∈ {t | IsLinftyAP (ε / 2) t f} := hl x
  obtain ⟨t, ⟨ht0, htl⟩, ht⟩ := this
  calc
    ‖f x - f y‖
      ≤ ‖f x - f (x + t)‖ + ‖f (x + t) - f (y + t)‖ + ‖f (y + t) - f y‖ := by
        simpa [sub_eq_add_neg] using
          norm_sub_le_of_sub_sub_le (f x) (f (x + t)) (f (y + t)) (f y)
    _ ≤ ε / 2 + 0 + ε / 2 := by
        gcongr
        · exact ht x
        · exact sub_eq_zero_of_eq (by linarith [ht0, htl, hxy])
        · exact ht y
    _ = ε := by ring

by
  rw [Metric.uniformContinuous_iff]
  intro ε εpos
  obtain ⟨l, hl⟩ := hf (ε / 2) (half_pos εpos)
  obtain ⟨t, ht, hft⟩ := hl 0
  use t
  intro x y hxy
  have := hft x
  have := hft y
  calc
    dist (f x) (f y)
      = ‖f x - f y‖ := rfl
    _ ≤ ‖f x - f (x + t)‖ + ‖f (x + t) - f (y + t)‖ + ‖f (y + t) - f y‖ := by
        simpa [dist_eq_norm] using
          norm_sub_le_add_norm_sub_add_norm_sub (f x) (f (x + t)) (f (y + t)) (f y)
    _ ≤ ε / 2 + ‖f (x + t) - f (y + t)‖ + ε / 2 := by
        gcongr <;> simp_all [IsLinftyAP]
    _ = ε + ‖f (x + t) - f (y + t)‖ := by ring
    _ ≤ ε + ε := by
        have := congr_arg (fun z ↦ f z) hxy
